title: Amtech - Multipurpose Sponge for Cleaning Various Surfaces, Highly Absorbent and Durable, Use Wet or Dry, Easy to Handle for Effective Cleaning
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ALL-PURPOSE CLEANING: The Amtech Multipurpose Sponge is designed for efficient cleaning across various surfaces, making it ideal for all-purpose use in the home or workshop.
WET AND DRY USE: Versatile in function, this sponge can be used both wet and dry, catering to a range of cleaning tasks from wiping surfaces to soaking up spills.
HIGH ABSORBENCY: With a capacity to hold up to 700ml of water without dripping, this sponge ensures thorough cleaning with minimal mess, maintaining its shape throughout.
DURABLE DESIGN: Made to last, the Amtech sponge retains its structure and absorbency over multiple uses, providing consistent performance.
CONVENIENT SIZE: Measuring H22cm x W11cm x D8cm, this sponge is perfectly sized for easy handling, allowing you to clean effectively with comfort.
description: Product Description Designed for efficient cleaning on various surfaces, the sponge is perfect for a wide range of cleaning tasks, from wiping down surfaces and soaking up spills to scrubbing stubborn grime for a sparkling clean finish. The sponge can hold up to 700ml of water without dripping, making it ideal for thorough cleaning jobs that require using a lot of water with minimal mess. Whether used wet or dry, the multipurpose sponge retains its shape and absorbency over many uses for a reliable clean every time.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: General Cleaning, Scrubbing, Applying Liquids, Polishing
